name: Curried Garbanzos
recipeIngredient: 2-16 oz can garbanzo beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the turmeric and mustard seeds. Stir until the seeds stop popping, then cover with a lid to prevent mess on the stove.
3. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
4. Add the chopped tomatoes, cayenne pepper, sugar, and salt. Cook until most of the liquid has evaporated.
5. Stir in the cilantro leaves and coconut flakes (if using).
6. Serve over rice. Enjoy immediately or after 10 minutes for best flavor.
